notebooks.title: Notebook index
notebooks.summary: Start here for the SDK workflow map.

notebooks.title: End-to-end workflow
notebooks.summary: Follow one realistic analysis from input setup through QC, uncertainty, reports, and interoperability.

notebooks.title: Public cohort exploration
notebooks.summary: Fetch public spectra, review burden, and inspect similarity structure before fitting.

notebooks.title: Resource portability
notebooks.summary: Bridge mSigPortal, TCGA/GDC, matrices, and exports.

notebooks.title: Bring your own spectra
notebooks.summary: Start from a local SBS96 matrix, validate it, fit signatures, and export a reproducible report.

notebooks.title: MAF to report
notebooks.summary: Convert MAF rows, fit signatures, inspect QC, and render report-ready outputs.

notebooks.title: Known-signature QC
notebooks.summary: Import, fetch, reshape, fit, and assess spectra.

notebooks.title: Cohort and panel workflow
notebooks.summary: Run cohort fitting and panel evidence review with metadata, assay territory, warnings, and report outputs.

notebooks.title: Panel evidence tiers
notebooks.summary: Review panel and WES assessability, evidence tiers, and callable-territory limits.

notebooks.title: NMF extraction
notebooks.summary: Run exploratory extraction without fixed signatures.

notebooks.title: Export and reports
notebooks.summary: Round-trip matrices and create reproducible reports.

notebooks.title: Multi-engine comparison
notebooks.summary: Run or import outputs from mSigSDK, SigProfilerAssignment, deconstructSigs, MuSiCal, and R nnls on one shared dataset.

notebooks.title: Experimental sandbox
notebooks.summary: Inspect explicitly experimental workflow outputs and scope statements.
